narrative: An AI Engineer at Microsoft with seven years of experience, bringing product‑company exposure and a solid track record of delivering ML features. The strongest factor in the ranking is the verified depth of his technical expertise, especially in search‑related models. He has hands‑on experience with BM25, Learning‑to‑Rank, OpenSearch and scikit‑learn, and recent work on QLoRA/LoRA fine‑tuning, directly matching the senior AI/ML search focus. His overall skill breadth and stable career further support the fit. However, he is based in Trivandrum and his notice period is unclear, which may affect immediate availability for the Pune/Noida location.
